channel.title: Posts on xyanrch's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on xyanrch's Blog

item.title: Deploy Hugo Blog to GitHub Pages
item.description: A step-by-step guide to setting up a Hugo blog with automatic deployment to GitHub Pages using GitHub Actions.

item.title: Hangzhou Travel Guide
item.description: A travel guide to Hangzhou, covering West Lake, Lingyin Temple, and local cuisine.

item.title: Building a Stack-Based VM: Design Walkthrough
item.description: A deep dive into the design of a stack-based virtual machine, covering architecture, instruction set, execution model, and memory management.

item.title: Building a Lua-like Language Frontend in C++
item.description: From lexer and parser to bytecode compiler — building a Lua-like language frontend for a stack-based VM.

item.title: Hello World
item.description: My first blog post powered by Hugo and GitHub Pages.
